zh.lifeSummary: 當Gunnora of Essex於大約1096年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk49歲，母親Adelise de Tosny34歲。她於大約1108年與Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1129年在英國艾可享年34歲。

zh-hans.Framlingham Castle, Thetford, Norfolk, E: 英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德
zh-hans.Marshwood, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特馬爾申武德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gunnora of Essex于大约1096年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk49岁，母亲Adelise de Tosny34岁。她于大约1108年与Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1129年在英国艾可享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Essex
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Essex, whose name is from Old English ēast ‘east’ + Seaxe ‘Saxons’. In England, the surname is now particularly common in Birmingham.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Gunnora of Essex was born about 1096, in Norfolk, England, her father, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, was 49 and her mother, Adelise de Tosny, was 34. She married Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh about 1108. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1129, in Essex, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gunnora of Essex est née environ 1096, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Tosny, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh environ 1108. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1129, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gunnora of Essex um 1096 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk 49 und ihre Mutter Adelise de Tosny 34. Sie hat um 1108 Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1129 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gunnora of Essex è nata il circa 1096 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Adelise de Tosny, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh circa 1108. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1129, nel Essex, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gunnora of Essexが約1096年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolkは49歳，母Adelise de Tosnyは34歳であった。約1108年にRobert of Essex Lord of Rayleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1129年にイギリスエセックスで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gunnora of Essex(이)가 대략 1096년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelise de Tosny(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1108년 Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1129년 영국 에세스에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Rayleigh, Rochford, Essex, England: Rayleigh, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Framlingham Castle, Thetford, Norfolk, E: Thetford, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gunnora of Essex nasceu aproximadamente 1096, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Tosny, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh aproximadamente 1108. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1129, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gunnora of Essex родилась около 1096 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Tosny, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh около 1108 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1129 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

sm.between 1109 and 1113: mai le 1109 e o'o I le 1113

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gunnora of Essex nació aproximadamente 1096, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Adelise de Tosny, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh aproximadamente 1108. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1129, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
